description: You are a Technical Artist at a game studio. Fix five critical bugs in the Python script process_models.py at /home/ga/workspace/asset_pipeline/ so that it correctly parses all .obj models in data/test_models/ and generates a valid aggregated assets.json file at /home/ga/workspace/asset_pipeline/assets.json. The script must be updated to handle irregular spacing between coordinates, correctly initialize bounding box min/max values for models in any coordinate space, convert 1-based face indices to 0-based, invalidate UV coordinates greater than 1.0, and aggregate all processed models into a single JSON array instead of overwriting the output file.

metadata.soc_major_group: Arts, Design, Entertainment, Sports, and Media
